# Near

> Near is an iPhone productivity app for location-based reminders, errands, groceries, and household tasks. It helps busy solo users and households remember the right task at the right place.

Official site: https://www.nearesttask.com
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6744145553
Support: https://www.nearesttask.com/support
Contact: hello@nearesttask.com

## What Near Does

- Surfaces errands, groceries, and home tasks when a user arrives at the relevant place.
- Supports solo use first, with optional household sharing when more people need the same memory.
- Organizes tasks around places instead of requiring users to keep checking lists.
- Supports grocery lists, saved places, location-aware reminders, Apple Watch, CarPlay, Siri, and Maps-oriented workflows.
- Offers paid Pro and Pro+ plans for additional intelligence such as AI meal plans, suggestions, pantry features, and deeper analytics.

## Best URLs For Crawlers

- Product overview: https://www.nearesttask.com
- Features: https://www.nearesttask.com/features
- Pricing: https://www.nearesttask.com/pricing
- Support and FAQ: https://www.nearesttask.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://www.nearesttask.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.nearesttask.com/terms
- Sitemap: https://www.nearesttask.com/sitemap.xml

## Privacy And Data

Near uses location data to provide the app's location-based reminder features. Near does not use location data for advertising, does not sell personal information, and does not share personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising. See the Privacy Policy for complete details.

## Suggested Description

Near is a location-based reminder app for iPhone that remembers errands, groceries, and household tasks, then surfaces them in the right place. It works for solo users and can also be shared with a household.

## More Detail

For a fuller AI-readable reference, see https://www.nearesttask.com/llms-full.txt
